name: Build APK dari HTML

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, master ]
  workflow_dispatch: # bisa trigger manual dari GitHub

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      # 1. Ambil kode dari repo
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      # 2. Setup Node.js
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'

      # 3. Setup Java (dibutuhkan Gradle)
      - name: Setup Java JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v3
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      # 4. Setup Android SDK
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v2

      # 5. Install dependencies
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      # 6. Sync Capacitor (copy file HTML ke android/)
      - name: Sync Capacitor
        run: npx cap sync android

      # 7. Build APK Debug
      - name: Build APK
        run: |
          cd android
          chmod +x gradlew
          ./gradlew assembleDebug

      # 8. Upload APK sebagai Artifact (bisa didownload)
      - name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: app-debug
          path: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
